underlying_goal: Add a brag-doc skill from the user's personal config to the beam-claude-skills marketplace plugin, iterate on its quality, test it, and announce it to engineers
friction_detail: Initial brag-doc template was too specific to user's second brain setup and had to be generalized.
brief_summary: User wanted to add a brag-doc skill to a shared marketplace plugin, refine its output quality using a reference blog, test it end-to-end, and draft an announcement — Claude handled the full workflow across multiple iterations successfully.
